details.notes: Added 4mp_varifocal camera type. Refactored quotation tool to support mixed camera types (8x 2MP bullet + 2x 4MP varifocal). Generated MOI Industrial Workshop quotation for 21,453 QAR. Renamed all pro

Researched top open-source SEO skills: claude-seo (AgriciDaniel, 8.9k stars, 25 sub-skills), seo-audit-skill (seo-skills, 251 rules), open-seo (every-app, 2.2k stars, MCP-based). Updated 3 skills: seo
